title: On the Dodge
description: A cowboy tracking his stolen buckskin horse stumbles into a deadly manhunt when a posse mistakes him for a bank robber and murderer. Wrongly accused and handcuffed, he must escape to prove his innocence and catch the real outlaws before the law—or a lynch mob—catches him. Set against the rugged landscape of the Old West, this fast-paced tale delivers frontier justice, gunfights, and a cowboy's unshakable determination to clear his name.
